preferred_example_tokens: what's happening with your water diagnostic hero
symptom issue selector with system readout
field service quote request flow with validation
service area region map with no fake towns
anti_tokens: fake service towns or map pins
recommended_weight_notes: Strong anchor for rural/trade field-service verticals where the user describes a symptom or diagnostic-first journey (well pump, water filtration, pressure, treatment) and wants a premium, trustworthy, technical-but-not-corporate light layout with dark instrument panels. Weight up when prompt mentions diagnose/symptom/issue selector, quote request flow, service area without fake locations, equipment/system diagram, or emergency-vs-planned framing. Weight down for dark high-contrast industrial gyms/excavation (use emberforge), editorial beauty/medspa, or formal corporate/legal brochures. Prefer this pack over generic three-card service templates when real plan hierarchy is wanted. Always carry the proof-safe policy forward; never let routing introduce fake licenses, response times, towns, reviews, or guarantees.
